provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, curved war horn made from a large dark animal horn, polished to a deep brown-black sheen, brass ferrule at the mouthpiece and brass band around the bell end, a braided leather carrying strap attached with brass rings, the horn surface shows natural ridges and color variation, imposing and ancient
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Braided leather war horn with brass fittings, dark bg. Unique shape, good material contrast between leather braid and brass tips.
